heading: Technology meets people.
paragraphs: I'm an Executive Technology Leader and Business Strategist with 19+ years of global experience delivering transformative digital and cloud programs. I've owned multi-million-euro portfolios, led 90+ professionals across 13 globally distributed teams, and driven programs for some of the world's largest insurance enterprises.

My work spans end-to-end program ownership, enterprise Agile & SAFe transformations, cloud migrations, and digital workplace deployments. I hold an Executive MBA from Kellogg School of Management (USA) and WHU (Germany), and I'm a SAFe 5 Certified Release Train Engineer and PRINCE2 Practitioner.

Outside of corporate engagements, I co-founded Physiando.de as CTO — building a GDPR-compliant healthtech platform connecting patients with physiotherapists across Germany. It's where I practise what I preach: lean execution, rigorous compliance, and human-centred product thinking.
